calculator.title: 计算器
tests: calculator controls and display can be discovered by behavior
clear resets display and backspace removes one digit
Escape / Enter / Backspace work without mouse clicks
calculator.promptSummary: 测试模型能否交付一个交互完整的网页计算器。
calculator.prompt: 请生成一个可直接打开使用的网页计算器。要求界面完整、交互清晰、无需外部依赖。

calendar.title: 日历
tests: calendar controls and day grid can be discovered by behavior
a current month or year title is rendered
at least 28 day cells are rendered
next/previous month navigation changes the title or grid
day cells or navigation controls are keyboard reachable
calendar.promptSummary: 测试模型能否交付一个交互完整的网页日历。
calendar.prompt: 请生成一个可直接打开使用的网页日历。要求界面完整、交互清晰、无需外部依赖。
